scope_note: QA Fibonacci Frobenius Congruences & Wall Divisibility cert [428]. Primary sources: Wall, D.D. (1960) 'Fibonacci series modulo m' American Mathematical Monthly 67(6) pp. 525-532 doi:10.2307/2309169 (zeros of F_k mod p form a subgroup; alpha(p) | p-(5/p); foundational for [416]-[427] chain); Lucas, E. (1878) 'Theorie des fonctions numeriques simplement periodiques' American Journal of Mathematics 1(2) pp. 184-240 doi:10.2307/2369308 (L_p = 1 mod p; L_n = phi^n + psi^n); Legendre, A.M. (1798) 'Essai sur la Theorie des Nombres' Paris (Legendre symbol (a/p); quadratic residues; Euler criterion: (a/p)=pow(a,(p-1)//2,p)). CLAIM (narrow and falsifiable): (C1) Fibonacci-Legendre congruence: F_p = (5/p) mod p for all primes p in [5,1000]; proved via Frobenius: split (p=+/-1 mod 5) -> phi^p=phi, psi^p=psi -> F_p=(phi-psi)/(phi-psi)=+1; inert (p=+/-2 mod 5) -> phi^p=psi -> F_p=(psi-phi)/(phi-psi)=-1; ramified p=5: F_5=5=0; 166/166 primes PASS. (C2) Lucas-Fermat congruence: L_p = 1 mod p for all primes p in [3,1000]; proved: L_p=phi^p+psi^p; split: phi^p=phi,psi^p=psi -> phi+psi=1 (sum of roots of x^2-x-1); inert: phi^p=psi,psi^p=phi -> psi+phi=1; both splitting types give 1; 167/167 primes PASS. (C3) Wall zero: F_{p-(5/p)} = 0 mod p for all primes in [5,1000]; split (5/p)=+1: F_{p-1}=0 (off-diagonal of M^{p-1}=I from FLT on eigenvalues in F_p); inert (5/p)=-1: F_{p+1}=0 (phi^{p+1}=phi*psi=-1, psi^{p+1}=-1, numerator 0); ramified: F_5=0; 166/166 PASS. (C4) Wall divisibility: alpha(p) | p-(5/p) for all primes in [5,1000]; from C3: p-(5/p) is a zero of k|->F_k mod p; alpha(p) is the smallest positive zero; all zeros are multiples of alpha (Wall 1960); 166/166 PASS. GL2 INTERPRETATION: C1=F_p gives the off-diagonal of Frob_p as a matrix in GL2(F_p); C2=L_p gives the trace of Frob_p; C3+C4 locate alpha(p) within the interval [1,p+1]. CONNECTS: [424] (split/inert classification) x [416] (alpha(p) exists) -> [428] (alpha(p) divides a known quantity p-(5/p)). THEOREM NT: all checks pure integer (Legendre symbol via Euler criterion pow(5,(p-1)//2,p); fast doubling for F_n; linear walk for alpha(p)); no float state. 4 checks PASS; self-test ok. Derived 2026-06-15.
